{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034551DE32908BA8BA3790AC2A"}"},"total":246},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7567940384919110424","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"np，看着很舒服，目前没有毒点，脑洞很大，剧情流畅，主要是主角的格局很打得开，看的很舒服，作者写的世界观也很大。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762051953,"group_id":"7558695583762893848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小时候那么多乐趣，现在都去了哪里(╥╯﹏╰╥)ง","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0HKJOt43lneKNCvA03ifsyzpKkir3EJvO8JBvEoaQP+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/752e55a8b1784234a76de8fca5ec0c7b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793882&x-signature=L1VyiVCq%2BOEtneSI25eNw7PpS1g%3D","user_id":"1106537129975098","user_name":"卯兔龙潜月(黎)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1106537129975098","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558695583762893848","book_info":{"abstract":"【智械天灾+争霸+游戏化+不降智】
蓝星研究员张怀远意外身穿到一个尖端科技与超凡力量并存的世界，更因为身份黑户问题直接被流放至混乱星球，天崩开局。
幸而觉醒了特殊的超凡力量：游戏人间。能将所有人的信息数据化展示，同时自身只要满足条件即可无视位面规则限制提升等级。
星械师→机械战备师→融合艺术家→灵魂赋予者→不朽技艺的化身→？？？
当技艺远超世界等级上限的创造者出现，钢铁洪流与灭世武器将碾压诸天万界一切阻挡。
臣服或者毁灭，是唯一的选择。
————
ps：本书前面节奏略慢。

"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3733,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":22058},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1762614409,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591367258743358270","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"软科幻，作者还是挺有功底的，毕竟写了两本领主文，节奏把握的很好，主角的成长也有写出来，大小姐不是女主，对主角来说算恩人，女主大概率可能是自由女神，果然，机械飞升的女主还是要智械来当，总体来说很好，在番茄来说尚佳，应该能评到8.7以上","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":43,"text":"大小姐","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742087513790AC2A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227591367258743358270%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227558695583762893848%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767508548,"group_id":"7558695583762893848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+woWwcV3SQTDkpiBrP0lrFi2GDvZ98du+YqYo+eG1Ye","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de8077f890ed46ecb206225dfdce49e1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792221&x-signature=8nMGn1Lg8YizD%2BjVxKQ1bPgBmpY%3D","user_id":"3318775245715091","user_name":"用户33187752"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3318775245715091","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558695583762893848","book_info":{"abstract":"【智械天灾+争霸+游戏化+不降智
